name: @axiom/sound
description: Axiom repository TOOL: author small Strudel sound sources for an Axiom app, semantically validate them with the real pinned Strudel implementation, render them offline to lossless WAV in headless Chromium, validate the PCM, encode to MP3, and atomically publish the MP3 + a generated audio manifest into the app's assets/. A Tool by its tools/ location: outside the engine dependency graph and exempt from the coverage/branchless gates. Strudel (AGPL), FFmpeg, and Chromium stay isolated in this tool and never link into or ship with the Axiom runtime.
